gi_header_slogan: Using accounting software has never been easier.
gi_lexnext_resumenB:
With client/server architecture, it allows connection via the Internet. The new version 8.0 offers you the complete treatment of your labour department. Clearly oriented in its development to the working methodology of the company or the professional office, it pursues and facilitates the use by them of the telematic advances that have been introduced by the administration such as R.E.D., Delt@, Contrat@, sending by batches to the A.E.A.T.

The application consists of the office management module, direct and simplified direct estimation regimes for professionals who are taxed as individuals, VAT management. If the professional chooses to do so or works under a different legal form, the accounting can be managed through the General Accounting Plan.

The labour management module fully completes the functionality of the programme, facilitating the calculation of payrolls, social security, contracts and any other related document.

It allows management with the office from anywhere and full integration with the rest of the IT management software without any upgrade or transfer process.

More than 130.000 users of our management applications guarantee the performance of this technology which, until now, has been reserved exclusively for large corporations.
gi_lexnext_intro:
The new version will make your accounting management a simple and user friendly task. Designed for those with little knowledge of accounting and fully integrated with MaGest that will act as an accountant for you. Without forgetting the needs of financial experts, providing functionalities that will allow you to squeeze the information derived from accounting. Its user friendly interface will undoubtedly invite you to discover a simple and fast working method.

Client/Server Technology

The new version 5 is based on MS SQL Server or its free MSDE version for database management. Power, security, speed and control are the fundamental advantages of this database. Another important factor is the softwares ability to be used simultaneously by an unlimited number of users and even to be accessed remotely.
gi_lexnext_resumen:
Adapted to the new general accounting plan (P.G.C.).

On 16 November 2007, the Royal Decrees governing the new General Accounting Plan were approved, effective as of 1 January 2008, the date on which all companies must adapt their accounting to the new regulations.

Also integrated in our suites

MaConta can be purchased individually or as part of one of our business management suites:

GestBox: Management and Accounting for Windows. Includes MaConta and MaGest or Eoswin depending on the legal form of your company.

Pymes Suite: Management, Accounting and Payroll for Windows. The composition of the accounting package also varies depending on the taxation regime.
gi_expedientes_resumen: Enter accounting entries quickly using the most common predefined journal entries.
gi_calendario_resumen: Operate with the balance sheet, trial balance or profit and loss.
gi_comunicaciones_resumen: Obtain a greater view of an account, or range of accounts, in a given period.
gi_agenda_resumen: Calculate and submit the forms 303/322/390 and consult the official book of purchases and sales.
gi_economico_resumen: Calculate and submit the 111/115/130/180 personal income tax forms.
gi_documentos: Annual accounts and legalisation of books
gi_documentos_resumen: Prepare the legalisation of annual books and accounts and import them into the register program.
gi_videoconsulta_resumen: Make sure you are always up to date with automatic updates.
gi_chat_resumen: Solve any kind of doubt or problem through our excellent Support Department.
gi_nueva_interface_resumen: If you are covered by the SII, with MaConta you will be able to telematically manage the remittance of invoices received or issued instantly without wasting time communicating them manually via the AEAT web portal. In addition to sending invoices, you can also check whether the invoice has already been sent or submit a cancellation if it is incorrect.
gi_gestiona_cobros_resumen: With the Analytical, Cost, Management or Internal Accounting module, you can distribute costs and profits (income) by department, site or section so that you can obtain an accurate picture of the company`s situation.
gi_gestiona_cobros_resumen2: By means of the analytical accounting tool, the system offers us at all times the actual situation of the company, as well as its units and departments, immediately generating balance sheets and accounting statements by units and departments.
gi_nuevas_funcionalidades_resumen: With the Standard 43 module you will be able to automatically balance the banks without having to do the tiresome process manually. You can simply use the file provided by your own bank to load and post the transactions you consider appropriate.
gi_comunica_lexnet_resumen: From MaConta you will be able to file your taxes conveniently and directly, without having to do it through the web page, obtaining the PDF with the justified form at the same time as the filing.
gi_tarifas_resumen: Choose the tariff that best suits your office, with the advantage of being able to expand as your business grows.

gi_privacidad_datos:
MICROAREA is committed to protecting the privacy of your data

We briefly explain how we handle your personal data.

Who is responsible for processing your data?

MICROAREA, S.L.U., with NIF number B24981607 and address in C/COFRENTES, 9 ENTRESUELO. 46010. Valencia (Valencia). Email address: info@microareanext.com.

For what purpose do we process your personal data?

We process the information you provide to send information, promotions and advertisements relating to our products and services by any means (postal, email or telephone).

How long do we keep your data?

The personal data you provide us will be kept as long as the commercial relationship is maintained and/or you do not request its cancellation.

What is the legitimacy of the processing of your data?

The legal basis for the processing of your data is based on the consent we request when collecting this data and/or on the need to have it to process your orders and fulfill the commitments we enter into with you contractually.

Will we communicate your data to third parties?

Not unless the law requires us to.

What are your rights when you provide us with your data?

You have the right to obtain confirmation that MICROAREA, S.L.U. we are processing your personal data, therefore, you have the right to access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data or request its deletion when the data is no longer necessary.

If you want to know more in detail how we process your data, consult our Privacy Policy.

gi_pago_seguridad_ANT: SAFETY ADVICE: The website uses information security techniques generally accepted in the industry, such as firewalls, access control procedures and cryptographic mechanisms, all in order to prevent unauthorized access to data. To achieve these purposes, the user/customer accepts that the supplier obtains the data for the purpose of corresponding authentication of access controls.
gi_pago_seguridad:
Credit Card VISA or MASTERCARD

  • We guarantee that each of the transactions made in MICROAREA is 100% secure. All operations involving the transmission of personal or banking data are carried out using a secure environment. MICROAREA uses a server based on standard SSL (Secure Socked Layer) security technology. All information you transmit to us travels encrypted across the network. (If you want to know more, visit our Secure Payment section).
  • Likewise, your credit card details are not recorded in any database but go directly to the Bank's POS (Point of Sale Terminal).
  • We also inform you that in an effort to provide greater security to credit card holders, we have incorporated the secure payment system called CES (Secure Electronic Commerce) into our payment gateway. In this way, if you have a "secure" card, you can always pay by VISA or MASTERCARD in our store.
  • In the event that your card is not adhered to this payment system, MICROAREA will only admit the payment with credit card VISA or MASTERCARD to customers with prior antigüedad and trustworthiness demonstrated.
  • In both cases, when paying by VISA or MASTERCARD card, the following information will always be requested: card number, expiry date and a Validation Code that corresponds to the last 3 digits of the number printed in italics on the back of the VISA or MASTERCARD card, thus offering greater guarantees regarding the security of the transaction.
  • Important: credit card fraud is a crime and MICROAREA will take legal action against anyone who makes a fraudulent transaction in our online store.
gi_tratamiento_datos_pedido: The data is stored in the "Electronic Commerce" file of MICROAREA, S.L.U. They will be used to manage your order and register as a user. We will use email and telephone to offer you offers for our products and services. You can withdraw your consent to receive offers from the shop by contacting us by email info@microareanext.com.

gi_condiciones_compra_texto:
• 1. Generality

    • These general terms and conditions regulate the relationship between MICROAREA, S.L.U., with N.I.F. B24981607, with address at C/COFRENTES, 9 46010 Valencia (Valencia) and third parties who purchase any product or service offered through the https://microarea. eg

    These general conditions have been drawn up taking into account, in particular, the following regulations:

    - Law 7/1996, of January 15, management of retail trade.
    - Law 7/1998, of April 13, on the general conditions of the contract.
    - Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007, of November 16, which approves the consolidated text of the General Law for the defense of consumers and users.
    - Law 34/2002, of July 11, services of the information society and electronic commerce.
    - Royal Decree 1906/1999, of December 17, which regulates telephone or telematic contracting with the general contracting conditions.

  • 2. Essential characteristics of products and services

    • The essential characteristics of the products and services offered in the store appear on the screen together with their visual identification.

  • 3. Price

    • The price of the products and services is visible next to each of them. VAT is not included, which will be added later in the purchase process. The current prices are those that appear on the website at the time of the order.

  • 4. Procedures for making the purchase

    • The procedures for purchasing products and services in the store are as follows:

    • 4.1. Access information about our products/services using the menu tabs located at the top of the home screen, or choose a specific one by "clicking" on any of those available.
    • 4.2. Add the products/services you wish to purchase to your cart by "clicking" on the "Buy" or "Add to Cart" button, if any.
    • 4.3. At any time it is possible to view the contents of the cart by "clicking" on the "Cart" option located at the top left of the web page.
    • 4.4. Check your cart. If the order is correct, choose the "Next" option. Otherwise, you can add or remove the corresponding products/services, or continue shopping by choosing the "Continue shopping" option.
    • 4.5. When you have finished adding products/services, choose the "Next" option.
    • 4.6. If you are already registered as a user of the site, you will need to enter with your credentials (User/Password).
    • 4.7. If you are not registered as a user of the site, enter your personal data.
    • 4.8. Confirm your data, then accept the "General conditions of purchase".
    • 4.9. As a last step, click on "Pay by card or Paypal". You will be redirected to the payment gateway.
    • 4.10. You will receive a confirmation of the purchase made.
  • 5. Shipping and handling costs. Delivery methods.

    • Delivery and transport costs are added at the end of the purchase process to find the final price. They vary according to the territory where the products are shipped. Products with an online downloadable version have no shipping costs. For the rest of the products the shipping costs are:

    Peninsula and Balearic Islands – 10€
    Canaries, Ceuta and Melilla – 20€
    Andorra – 20€

  • 6. Method of payment.

    • It is possible to pay the price of products and services by credit card.

  • 7. Exercise of the right of withdrawal.
    • 7.1. In all cases of withdrawal or termination of the product sales or service purchase contract, you can use the "Withdrawal document" that you will receive with the product or with the service welcome letter.
    • 7.2. Programs in physical support. The buyer has a period of seven working days to resolve the purchase made without having to indicate any reason. To exercise this right of withdrawal, the corresponding program must not have been opened.

      • In this case you will not have to bear any costs or penalties, but you will have to bear the shipping costs of the returned product. The seven day period will be counted from the day the program is received and according to the working day calendar of the receiving address. MICROAREA, S.L.U. will refund the amount paid by the program within 48 hours of receiving the returned product.

    • 7.3. Programs with online download and SI-Online service. Due to the nature of the service, it will not be possible to exercise the right of withdrawal in the case of programs with online downloads, as these are files whose installation on the user's computer takes place immediately for permanent use. Nor is it possible to exercise the right of withdrawal from the SI-Online service, since the downloaded information can also be used immediately.
    • 7.4. Program Maintenance Services. You may discontinue maintenance of a computer program if it was contracted as an accessory to your purchase and returned. If the maintenance service has been acquired independently, it can be terminated during the first seven working days, counted from its contract, if the service has not started to be received.
    • 8. Affirmations.

      • The user can address his complaints to Customer Service by telephone 963 387 920, by e-mail info@ microareanext.com or in writing to the following address:

      MICROAREA, S.L.U.
      Customer Service Department
      C/COFRENTES, 9 ENTRESUELO
      46010 Valencia (Valencia)
gi_politica_privacidad_texto:
• I.- Who is responsible for processing your data?

    • This privacy policy (hereinafter, the "Privacy Policy") applies to all personal data that you provide to the MICROAREA group, S.L.U., with address at C/COFRENTES, 9 46010, VALENCIA, VALENCIA (hereinafter "MICROAREA") via online forms or when making a purchase on its website.

    For the purposes of this Privacy Policy, "User" means any natural person interested in the products and services that MICROAREA offers through its web pages. MICROAREA, as data controller, will request, before providing personal data, the User's express consent to this Privacy Policy, where necessary, and to any other aspect that requires the User's prior authorisation. The objective of the MICROAREA Privacy Policy is to provide transparency on how we treat your data and to protect information on the Internet and the data that the user can enter on the web.

    The User can contact the MICROAREA Legal and Regulatory Compliance Office via info@microareanext.com for any question or need regarding protection some data.

  • II.- For what purpose do we process your personal data?

    • The User is informed that MICROAREA may process the personal data that the User provides through online forms or during the purchase process of any MICROAREA product, for the purposes indicated below: to the extent that there is a legal basis for each treatment as explained below:

    • (a) Guarantee the User's access to and use of their personal space in the reserved area of the web pages of the products and services offered by MICROAREA.
    • (b) Manage the purchases and requests that the User makes on the MICROAREA web pages.
    • (c) Inform the User by any means, including sending commercial communications to the e-mail address provided by the User, of MICROAREA products and services similar to those purchased by the User.
    • (d) Carry out promotional activities on other MICROAREA products and services, including sending commercial communications to the e-mail address provided by the User.
    • (e) To carry out promotional activities, including the sending of commercial communications to the e-mail address provided by the User by MICROAREA, of products or services of third-party companies collaborating with MICROAREA in the following sectors: financial and banking, insurance, training, publishing and publications, fairs and events, software and IT services, telecommunications, leisure and tourism, NGOs, energy and water, automotive, optics, electronics, audiovisual and courier services. All this, as long as we ask for the User's consent and he grants it to us.
    • (f) Transfer personal data to authorized software distributors for the purpose of marketing software products, solutions and services only, provided that we ask for your consent to do so and that they grant it to us.
  • III.- What is the legitimacy of the processing of your personal data?

    • The legal basis of the data processing for purposes (a) and (b) is the execution of the contract for the supply of services and/or the purchase of the related products.

    The legal basis of data processing for purpose (c) will be both the User's consent, if requested and granted, and the legitimate interest of MICROAREA to inform him of products or services similar to those he has previously purchased.

    The legal basis of the data processing for the purposes (d), (e) and (f) is the consent that could have been requested from the User, without in any case the revocation of the same affecting the execution of the service service contract. The User's personal data will not be processed for these purposes if MICROAREA has not requested consent.

    MICROAREA, upon registration, will collect and process the personal data essential for registration and access to the User's personal space. In the event that the latter decides to purchase a MICROAREA product or service, MICROAREA will collect and process the data necessary to manage the purchase process (including name, surname, ID, address, etc.). The User knows and accepts that failure to provide certain personal data will prevent MICROAREA from providing all those services connected to such data. In no event will MICROAREA assign, exploit this data or use it for a use other than that expressly indicated here. During the registration process, the User will be informed of the non-mandatory nature of the collection of some of the data for the provision of MICROAREA services.

  • IV.- How long do we keep your personal data?

    • MICROAREA will keep the data of its customers for the entire duration of their contractual relationship and subsequently the data will be kept for promotional actions for a period of two years, for other types of users the data will also be kept for a period of two years, (unless, in both cases, that the treatment is based on the User's consent and the latter revokes it, in which case they will be kept until such revocation is received) therefore, the data will not be kept beyond the time necessary for the purposes described above, without prejudice to the conservation that becomes necessary for the formulation, exercise or defense of any claims and/or where permitted by applicable legislation.

  • V.- Who has access to your personal data?

    • An optimal provision of the service that MICROAREA offers through its website may require that other third-party service providers of MICROAREA access the User's personal data as data controllers. By accepting this Privacy Policy, the User understands that some of the aforementioned service providers are located in countries outside the European Economic Area or do not offer a level of security equivalent to Spanish. In these cases, the transfers are based on the authorization of the Directorate of the Spanish Supervisory Authority, on model clauses approved by the Commission or, where applicable, on the privacy shield. To obtain more information on previous guarantees or on the fact that they have been provided, it is possible to contact MICROAREA through the means established in section I.

    In addition to the access third party providers may have to personal data under the responsibility of MICROAREA as data controllers, national or international, in the context of providing a service to the data controller, MICROAREA may transfer personal data of the User to the authorized MICROAREA Distributors, referred to in section II, provided that consent has been requested from the User and that the latter has given it.

    In addition to the above, MICROAREA may carry out transfers or communications of personal data to fulfill its obligations towards the Public Administrations in the cases provided for by the legislation in force from time to time and, where appropriate, also to other subjects such as the Armed Forces and Bodies of State Security and Judicial Bodies.

  • VI.- What are the user rights?

    • MICROAREA informs the User about the possibility that assists him to exercise the rights of access, rectification, opposition, cancellation, portability and limitation of treatment, as well as to refuse the automated treatment of personal data collected by MICROAREA.

    These rights may be exercised free of charge by the User and, where applicable, by his representative, by written and signed request addressed to the following address: C/COFRENTES, 9 ENTRESUELO, 46010, Valencia, Valencia. This request must contain in the subject line the reference "Data protection/[Name of the MICROAREA group company]" and must include the following information: User's name and surname, address for notification purposes, photocopy of identity document Document or passport and petition specifying the request. In case of representation, it must be proven by a reliable document. Likewise, the User can exercise the aforementioned rights via the email info@microareanext.com.

    In addition to the previous rights, the User will have the right to revoke the consent given through the procedure described above at any time, without this revocation of consent affecting the lawfulness of the processing before its revocation. MICROAREA may continue to process User data within the limits permitted by applicable legislation.

    Similarly, when the processing of your personal data for purpose (c) is based on a legitimate interest, you can object.

    MICROAREA reminds the User that he has the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

  • VII.- Unsubscribe from the service for sending commercial communications

    • As mentioned in the previous section, the User has the right to revoke the consent given for the sending of commercial communications at any time by simply notifying MICROAREA with which he informs that he does not want to continue receiving commercial communications. To do this, the User can withdraw his consent in the manner described in the previous section or click on the link included in each commercial communication, thus canceling the sending of electronic commercial communications.

  • VIII.- From what age can the user access our products and services?

    • The MICROAREA site is not aimed at children under the age of 18. By accepting this Privacy Policy, the user represents and warrants that he/she is over 18 years of age.

  • IX.- What security measures have we implemented?

    • MICROAREA undertakes to respect the obligation of secrecy of personal data and the duty to keep them and will adopt the necessary measures to prevent their alteration, loss, treatment or unauthorized access, in compliance with the provisions of the legislation applicable.

    MICROAREA has implemented the necessary technical and organizational security measures to guarantee the security of your personal data and prevent its alteration, loss and treatment and/or unauthorized access, taking into account the state of the technology, the nature of stored data and the risks to which they are exposed, whether they come from human action or from the physical or natural environment, according to the provisions of the applicable legislation.

    The privacy-conscious MICROAREA body, in order to strengthen the confidentiality and integrity of information in its organization, constantly maintains supervision, control and evaluation of its processes to ensure compliance with privacy and information security, according to international standards.

  • X.- Use of cookies

    • Our website uses cookies to distinguish you from other users of our website, which helps us to provide you with a good experience when you browse our website and also allows us to improve it. You can get more information on the use of cookies in the Cookies Policy.

  • XI.- Connections

    • The MICROAREA website may include hypertext links to other sites that are not managed or controlled by MICROAREA. For this reason MICROAREA does not guarantee, nor is it responsible, for the legality, reliability, usefulness, truthfulness and timeliness of the contents of such websites or their privacy practices. Please note that their data protection compliance may differ from ours before providing your personal information to these websites outside the MICROAREA.

  • XII.- Modification of the Privacy Policy

    • MICROAREA may modify its Privacy Policy at any time in compliance with the applicable legislation. In any case, any modification of the Privacy Policy will be duly notified to the User so that he is informed of the changes that have occurred in the processing of his personal data and, in the event that the applicable legislation requires it, the User can grant the user consent.
gi_web_cookies:
This website uses cookies to obtain statistical data on the navigation of its users.
If you continue browsing, we consider that you accept their use.
tb_ejercicio: Opening and closing of the financial year
textoAgenda_0: With MaConta you will be able to prepare the quarterly VAT forms (or monthly if applicable) with their respective annual form, as well as the 322 (for groups of companies). In addition, you can also file the information forms 340, 347 and 349.
textoCalendario_0: View, print or export balance sheets in any format (including Excel or PDF) and operate with them or simply view them against the previous year`s movements and broken down by accounts to obtain the greatest possible level of detail.
textoChat_0: Thanks to our qualified Technical Support Department you will be able to solve any kind of doubt about the programme or its operation. You can make use of this by telephone, email or social networks.
textoComunicaciones_0: View the status of an account, or several of them, for a given date or by specifying a range of dates and print or export them in PDF or Excel. Also, review the status of customer or supplier/creditor accounts easily with a single click.
textoDocumentos_0: Generate the necessary files to be able to import them into the registrar programme in order to be able to file them. Export in PDF or Excel the books with the balance sheets in one or several files together with the annual report or generate the XML file with the annual accounts.
textoEconomico_0: Generate income taxes on a monthly, quarterly or annual basis (as required) and file them or obtain a draft for pre-checking.
textoExpedientes_0: Post incoming invoices, outgoing invoices (with or without rebates), payrolls, self-employed payrolls, purchase and depreciation of fixed assets or use the automatic offsetting entry to enter accounting entries in an easy and simple way.
textoVideoconsulta_0: With an automatic update service, you can be sure that you always have the latest updates. In a completely autonomous way, MaConta will have the most recent legislative revisions. In addition, the same service will also incorporate any future improvements that may be implemented in the programme.
gi_demo_enviada_texto: We have sent an email with a link to download the program. If the email address you provided is correct, you will find a link to download the product, a license code, and an installation guide. Remember that you can call us if you need assistance with the installation or the first steps of the product at +34 96 338 79 20. Thank you for your interest.
